CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I integer primary key, XMLVAL XMLType);
INSERT INTO TEST_XMLS VALUES (3, XMLType('<oil-rig xml:id="14a_02" water="0.413"/><oil-rig xml:id="14b_02" water="0.402"/>'));
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getClobVal() as ENAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//poname').getClobVal() as PONAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/pono');

SELECT e1.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getClobVal() as ENAME, e2.XMLVAL.extract('//poname').getClobVal() as PONAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e1, TEST_XMLS AS e2 WHERE e1.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AND e2.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/pono');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//employee/ename').getClobVal() as ENAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/company/employee/empno');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//purchaseOrder/poname').getClobVal() as PONAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/company/purchaseOrder/pono');
WITH XMLData AS (SELECT XMLVAL FROM TEST_XMLS WHERE I = 4) SELECT XMLData.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getClobVal() as ENAME FROM XMLData;
